header.title: Frequently asked questions
header.subtitle: Answers to common questions about our services and process.

faqItems.question: How long does an automation implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typical implementations take 2–8 weeks depending on complexity. Simple workflow automations can be live in just a few days.

faqItems.question: Will automation integrate with our existing systems?
faqItems.answer: Yes. We design solutions that seamlessly integrate with popular tools like Slack, Salesforce, HubSpot, Google Workspace, Zapier, and many more.

faqItems.question: What's the typical ROI of an AI implementation?
faqItems.answer: Our clients typically see ROI within 1–3 months. Average savings are 20–40% of operational costs in automated areas.

faqItems.question: Do we need technical expertise to use your solutions?
faqItems.answer: No. We design our solutions to be intuitive and easy to use. We provide full team training and documentation.

faqItems.question: What does post-implementation support look like?
faqItems.answer: We provide ongoing technical support, system monitoring, and regular updates. Professional and Enterprise plans include priority support.

Helping Businesses
Grow with AI
header.subtitle: We streamline operations through intelligent automation — so you can focus on what matters most.

story.title: A team of AI & automation experts
story.content: Hazelgrouse Studio is a team of engineers and consultants specializing in intelligent automation. We combine deep technical expertise with business understanding to deliver solutions that truly transform our clients' operations. We believe AI should be accessible to every business — not just enterprises.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We stay at the cutting edge of AI and automation technology to deliver the best solutions.

items.title: Integrity
items.description: Transparent pricing, honest communication, and no hidden costs. You always know where you stand.

items.title: Customer Empowerment
items.description: We build solutions that make your team more capable, not dependent on us.

items.title: Growth First
items.description: Every decision we make is focused on driving measurable growth for your business.

faqItems.question: What industries do you work with?
faqItems.answer: We work across healthcare, finance, retail, logistics, and technology. Our solutions adapt to any industry.

faqItems.question: How do we get started?
faqItems.answer: Book a free consultation. We'll analyze your processes and provide a tailored automation roadmap.

faqItems.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
faqItems.answer: Not at all. We handle all the technical complexity. You focus on your business.

faqItems.question: Who is the data controller?
faqItems.answer: The data controller is Hazelgrouse Studio. Data is processed in accordance with applicable laws, including GDPR.

faqItems.question: What data do we collect?
faqItems.answer: We collect data provided by users in contact forms (name, email address) and technical data necessary for the proper functioning of the website.

faqItems.question: For what purposes do we process data?
faqItems.answer: Data is processed for the purpose of handling contact inquiries and providing services.

faqItems.question: What rights does the user have?
faqItems.answer: Users have the right to access, rectify, delete, restrict processing, data portability, and the right to object to processing.
